title: Automate project intake with multi-agent AI using MCP, Google ADK, Cloud Run, and BigQuery
summary: Google Cloud Tech demonstrates automating project intake with a multi-agent AI system that integrates Asana, Vertex AI, and BigQuery. The system assigns risk scores, checks resources, and delivers Go/No-Go recommendations in seconds using the Agent Development Kit (ADK) for orchestration and the Model Context Protocol (MCP) for connecting agents to data sources.
